name: Green Beans with Roasted Onions
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds slender green beans, ends trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Spray two heavy large baking sheets with vegetable oil spray.
3. Arrange onions in a single layer on the prepared sheets.
4. Dot each onion with 4 tablespoons butter, dividing equally.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Bake until the onions are dark brown on the bottom, about 35 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, boil the chicken broth in a heavy large skillet over high heat until reduced to 1/2 cup, about 6 minutes.
8. Add sugar and vinegar and whisk until the sugar dissolves and the mixture comes to a boil.
9. Add onions to the sauce; reduce heat to medium-low.
10. Simmer until the liquid is slightly reduced, about 5 minutes.
11. Season with salt and pepper (can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate. Rewarm over low heat before continuing).
12. Cook green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Drain well.
13. Return beans to the same pot. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons butter and toss to coat.
14. Mound beans in a large shallow bowl.
15. Top with onion mixture and serve.
